name: Web Research
summary: A guided deep-research workflow: fan out searches, fetch + verify sources, synthesize a cited report.
description: A SKILL.md that codifies how to research a question well -- multiple searches, fetch primary sources, adversarially verify claims, write a cited synthesis. No accounts, no secrets; uses the model's built-in web search/fetch. Installing copies it into your skills so any agent can invoke /web-research.
